chunks.text: , ORDERSHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C.P.No. D - 263 of 2021. Date Order with signature of Judge 1.For orders on CMA l24O 12021. 2.For orders on CMA l24ll2o2l. 3.For hearing of main case. 2A.o3.2023. None present for the Petitioner. It appears that instant petition was filed on O8'O2'2O2L and thereafter the petitioner has not pursued the matter diligently' It shows that he has lost interest in the petition, therefore, same is dismissed for non-prosecution alongwith listed applications' JU GE JUDGE Akber.
